verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Germany as the primary candidate. The tournament logic effectively used the 'Döner' sign and architectural cues to resolve the ambiguity between Germany and Denmark.
